properties.description: Cyber Defense Centre (CDC) of Oman cloud security controls framework covering technical requirements (CDC-TR-*), policy requirements (CDC-POL-*), and contractual requirements (CDC-CON-*) for external cloud service usage. Includes controls for network security, identity & access, encryption, logging, backup, AI governance, and data protection.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_01a
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Implement firewalls and DDoS protection mechanisms at the network level to protect cloud services.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_01b
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Apply secure configurations (OS Hardening) to operating systems, networks, servers, and user accounts.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_02
policyDefinitionGroups.displayName: CDC-TR-02: Centralized Identity and Access Management
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Manage permissions and identity centrally using RBAC, IBAC, ABAC mechanisms, and implement tokenization for sensitive data.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_03
policyDefinitionGroups.displayName: CDC-TR-03: SIEM Integration and Log Aggregation
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Audit user activities and data movements using SIEM systems integrated with log aggregation tools.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_04a
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Enable two-factor (2FA) or multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users accessing cloud services.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_04b
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Enable conditional access based on geographic location (Geo-Blocking) to restrict access from unauthorized regions.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_05
policyDefinitionGroups.displayName: CDC-TR-05: Penetration Testing and Risk Assessment
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Conduct technical security assessments (penetration testing) and risk analysis for cloud environments.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_06
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Classify all data according to sensitivity levels as per applicable laws and regulations.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_07a
policyDefinitionGroups.displayName: CDC-TR-07a: Data Encryption in Transit and at Rest
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Protect data during transfer, processing, and storage using encryption mechanisms.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_07b
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Apply encryption using single, double, or customer-managed keys (BYOK) based on data sensitivity.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_07c
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Implement the principle of least privilege for access to data in transit and cloud resources.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_08
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Enable data loss prevention (Cloud DLP) capabilities across all cloud applications to prevent data leakage.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_09
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Configure antivirus and antimalware systems for all servers and user devices.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_10
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Install and maintain patch management software covering all systems and applications.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_11
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Maintain regular offline backups of data, ensure secure and encrypted storage, with recovery capability for emergencies.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_TR_12
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Develop and maintain a plan for responding to cybersecurity incidents affecting cloud services.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_POL_01
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Organizations must classify data per Oman regulations before requesting external cloud services approval.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_POL_02
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Organizations must comply with all policies and circulars issued by the Cyber Defense Centre.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_POL_03
policyDefinitionGroups.description: CDC determines approved geographic regions for hosting classified and sensitive data after verifying provider compliance with data protection laws.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_POL_05
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Conduct risk assessment for external hosting, link to organizational risk register, and obtain head of organization approval.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_POL_06
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Information security team must verify security controls implementation and submit technical audit reports to CDC every six months.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_POL_07
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Maintain local backup copies of all data following best practices, with ability to process within Oman if external cloud access is lost.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_POL_08
policyDefinitionGroups.description: AI applications via external cloud computing may be used subject to MTCIT policies and CDC controls.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_POL_10
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Organizations must not store or transfer data classified as Secret or Top Secret to external cloud providers.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_POL_13
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Organizations must apply approved policies from relevant authorities when managing encryption keys.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_CON_03
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Use encryption mechanisms at all stages (storage, transfer) preventing loss, alteration, unauthorized disclosure, or accidental destruction.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_CON_06
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Provider must immediately notify CDC and organization of any security incident affecting organization data, systems, or protection mechanisms.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: CDC_CON_07
policyDefinitionGroups.displayName: CDC-CON-07: Audit Log Platform and Retention
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Provider must provide platform for viewing audit logs and managing technical/security events with minimum 6-month retention.
